languages.text: "...кхимера со вживленным сознанием архонта кабала Смертоносных Клинков, который нажил себе врагов среди касты гемункулов. Несмотря на свое состояние, Ярость пустоты сохранил свой извращенный и мстительный ум. Существование такого создания само по себе достойно моей коллекции, и я потратил немало сил, разыскивая этот экспонат".

traits.locale_text: "Ярость пустоты — кхимера со вживленным сознанием архонта кабала Смертоносных Клинков, который нажил себе врагов среди касты гемункулов. Несмотря на свое состояние, сохранил свой извращенный и мстительный ум. Существование такого создания само по себе достойно моей коллекции, и я потратил немало сил, разыскивая этот экспонат".

languages.text: "...a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."
languages.original_text: "...кхимера со вживленным сознанием архонта кабала Смертоносных Клинков, который нажил себе врагов среди касты гемункулов. Несмотря на свое состояние, Ярость пустоты сохранил свой извращенный и мстительный ум. Существование такого создания само по себе достойно моей коллекции, и я потратил немало сил, разыскивая этот экспонат".

Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

"This Void Fury is a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite his condition, he has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

"This Void Fury is a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite his condition, he has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

"...a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

languages.text: “……这只柯美拉体内被植入了死刃阴谋团执政官的意识。这位执政官在血伶人阶层中树敌颇多。即使变成这副模样，虚无愤怒依然保留了他那扭曲、充满复仇欲的心智。单单是这种生物的存在本身，就值得我收藏。我可是费了不少力气才寻到这样一件藏品。”
languages.original_text: "...a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

traits.locale_text: “……这只柯美拉体内被植入了死刃阴谋团执政官的意识。这位执政官在血伶人阶层中树敌颇多。即使变成这副模样，虚无愤怒依然保留了他那扭曲、充满复仇欲的心智。单单是这种生物的存在本身，就值得我收藏。我可是费了不少力气才寻到这样一件藏品。”

languages.text: « ... un kyméraée dans lequel a été implantée la conscience de l'archonte de la Kabale des Lames mortelles, qui s'était mis la caste des hémoncules à dos. Malgré son état, l'esprit de cette fureur du Vide est toujours aussi maléfique et vengeur. L'existence même de cette créature la rend digne de figurer dans ma collection, et j'ai redoublé d'efforts pour la trouver. »
languages.original_text: "...a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

traits.locale_text: « ... un kyméraée dans lequel a été implantée la conscience de l'archonte de la Kabale des Lames mortelles, qui s'était mis la caste des hémoncules à dos. Malgré son état, l'esprit de cette fureur du Vide est toujours aussi maléfique et vengeur. L'existence même de cette créature la rend digne de figurer dans ma collection, et j'ai redoublé d'efforts pour la trouver. »

languages.text: «... una kymera con la conciencia del Arconte de la Kábala de los Filos Mortales implantada. El Arconte se había ganado la enemistad de la casta de los Hemónculos. Pese a su estado, la furia del vacío conserva su retorcida y vengativa mente. La existencia de semejante criatura merece de por sí estar en mi colección, e invertí un esfuerzo considerable en obtener este ejemplar».
languages.original_text: "...a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

traits.locale_text: «... una kymera con la conciencia del Arconte de la Kábala de los Filos Mortales implantada. El Arconte se había ganado la enemistad de la casta de los Hemónculos. Pese a su estado, la furia del vacío conserva su retorcida y vengativa mente. La existencia de semejante criatura merece de por sí estar en mi colección, e invertí un esfuerzo considerable en obtener este ejemplar».

languages.text: "Haimonkulus kastında düşmanlar edinen Ölüm Kılıçları Kabalı Arkonu'nun bilincinin yerleştirildiği bir Kimera'dır. Durumuna rağmen Uçsuz Öfkesi, çarpık ve intikamcı zihnini korumuştur. Böyle bir yaratığın varlığı, başlı başına koleksiyonuma dâhil olmaya layıktır. Bu parçayı bulmak için büyük çaba harcadım."
languages.original_text: "...a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

traits.locale_text: "Haimonkulus kastında düşmanlar edinen Ölüm Kılıçları Kabalı Arkonu'nun bilincinin yerleştirildiği bir Kimera'dır. Durumuna rağmen Uçsuz Öfkesi, çarpık ve intikamcı zihnini korumuştur. Böyle bir yaratığın varlığı, başlı başına koleksiyonuma dâhil olmaya layıktır. Bu parçayı bulmak için büyük çaba harcadım."

languages.text: "... eine Khymera mit dem implantierten Bewusstsein des Archons der Kabale der Deathblades, der sich Feinde in der Haemonculus-Kaste machte. Trotz ihres Zustandes hat sich die Leerenwut ihr unredliches und rachsüchtiges Wesen bewahrt. Die Existenz einer solchen Kreatur an sich ist meiner Sammlung bereits würdig, und ich habe große Anstrengungen unternommen, um dieses Exponat zu finden."
languages.original_text: "...a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

traits.locale_text: "... eine Khymera mit dem implantierten Bewusstsein des Archons der Kabale der Deathblades, der sich Feinde in der Haemonculus-Kaste machte. Trotz ihres Zustandes hat sich die Leerenwut ihr unredliches und rachsüchtiges Wesen bewahrt. Die Existenz einer solchen Kreatur an sich ist meiner Sammlung bereits würdig, und ich habe große Anstrengungen unternommen, um dieses Exponat zu finden."

languages.text: 「死の刃の教団のアーコンの意識を移植されたキメラ。ハエモンクルス種族に敵対した。その状態にもかかわらず、虚空の怒りという存在は歪んだ復讐心を失っていない。このような存在は、コレクションに値する。私はこの標本を手に入れるために、多くの努力を費やした。」
languages.original_text: "...a Khymera with the implanted consciousness of the Archon of the Kabal of the Deathblades, who made enemies among the Haemonculus caste. Despite its condition, the Void Fury has retained his twisted and vengeful mind. The existence of such a creature is in itself worthy of my collection, and I spent a great deal of effort seeking out this piece."

traits.locale_text: 「死の刃の教団のアーコンの意識を移植されたキメラ。ハエモンクルス種族に敵対した。その状態にもかかわらず、虚空の怒りという存在は歪んだ復讐心を失っていない。このような存在は、コレクションに値する。私はこの標本を手に入れるために、多くの努力を費やした。」
